title: Moonlit Vietnamese Reblochon Pho
description: Floral, silky, crowd-pleaser Vietnamese dish featuring reblochon, mother-sauce-base, ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly, form=pho-bo, vessel=tagine-pot. Perfect for a comforting, yet elegant dinner.

ingredients.name: Mother sauce base
ingredients.notes: a mixture of fish sauce, soy sauce, lime juice, and chili flakes

instructions: Combine mother sauce base, bone broth, and sliced ginger in a large tagine pot over low heat.
Bring the mixture to a gentle simmer and cook for 20 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together.
Add sliced onion to the pot and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until softened.
Cook rice noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
Strain the broth through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean pot, discarding the solids.
Add reblochon cheese to the pot and stir until melted and smooth.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve the pho hot, garnished with chopped cilantro and a squeeze of lime juice.
Ladle cooked noodles into bowls and pour the hot broth over the top.
